summary: Added a brief opening bridge from the chapter 16 wagon arrival into the bakery supper setup, and rephrased the final packing inventory so chapter 18 can pick it up cleanly without a verbatim repeat.
edits: Bridged the opening to explain why Cora and Dell are away after Hester drives everyone into town at the end of chapter 16.
Rephrased the final under-the-worktable inventory to preserve continuity with chapter 18 while avoiding line-level duplication.
Confirmed no style-bible example_lines appeared verbatim in the chapter.
